name: Silvia's Shrimp Creole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Louisiana brand gumbo mix (dissolved in 1 cup water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the margarine until melted.
2. Add the chopped bell peppers, onions, celery, mashed tomatoes, minced garlic, bay leaf, oregano, and sugar.
3. Dissolve the gumbo mix in 1 cup of water.
4. Stir in the dissolved mixture into the pot and bring to a simmer.
5. Cook for 1 hour and 45 minutes.
6. Add the shrimp and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve over steamed rice. Serves 18-20 people.
